title: Single LapTime minus Race median feature
summary: Add only LapTime minus per-Race median as a small feature test.
rationale: The current best parent is 001199 with CV 0.9544491320 and public 0.95409. This hypothesis is an atomic child patch intended to exploit the confirmed two-seed RealMLP core plus low-weight CatBoost correction direction.
implementation_hint: Start from 001199. Add one covariate-only feature: LapTime (s) minus the median LapTime within Race. Do not add other race-relative features. Preserve all models and blend weights.
expected_effect: Test a minimal local-context speed feature without broad FE churn.
risk: Median-based covariate context may not improve beyond existing features.
